title: Salty Venezuelan Yellow Masarepa Quesadilla
description: This raw-friendly Venezuelan dish features crispy yellow masarepa wrapped in a salty filling and air-fried for a satisfying solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Filling (such as boiled potatoes, peppers, onions)

instructions: Mix olive oil and salt in a bowl.
Sprinkle the masarepa with the oil-salt mixture on both sides until evenly coated, making sure not to overcrowd the bowl.
Place each piece of masarepa into the air fryer basket and cook for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown. Flip halfway through cooking time.
Assemble the quesadillas by placing a filling piece in one half of the cooked masarepa, then fold and place on top of another piece coated with oil-salt mixture.
Cook the assembled quesadilla for an additional 2-3 minutes or until golden brown on both sides. Serve hot.
